title: Necvediy 9 Pack Crystal Slime Kit for Girls and Boys,Jelly Cube Clear Slime Set,Crunchy Glitter Scented Slime Party Favor Gifts,Stress Relief Slime Toy for Adults and Kids
features: 🎁【Cute Mini Slime】9 colours of jelly cube slime with unicorn, pineapple, watermelon, rainbow, dragon fruit, avocado, star, crab, panda charms.
🎁【Perfect Party Gift】Suitable as a birthday gift,party gift for your boys,girls,classroom rewards for students,Easter,Halloween,Christmas gifts for family and friends.
🎁【Soft and Transparent】This mini crystal slime has a super soft texture, perfect for adults and kids to squeeze, knead, roll, fold and stretch the slime.
🎁【Colourful Slime】Slime is amazingly textured and scented, Super soft DIY stress relieving toy.
🎁【How to Store】Please put the slime back into the container when not in use. The bottle is well sealed to keep the slime stretching for better gaming fun!
description: Product description TIPS: Slimes contain small parts inside, so beware of choking! CAN NOT EAT! Safety Warning CAN NOT EAT!
